description: Move all provider-related configuration (api_key, api_url, default_provider, default_model, default_temperature, agents) from config.toml to database. This includes: 1) DB schema changes (add temperature to providers, create agents table), 2) Remove fields from Config struct, 3) Update all read paths to fetch from DB, 4) Update all write paths to save to DB, 5) Update Dockerfile, 6) Fix tests.
title: Migrate provider and agent config from config.toml to database
